nasb.text: this Man, delivered over by the predetermined plan and foreknowledge of God, you nailed to a cross by the hands of godless men and put Him to death.

esv.text: this Jesus,  delivered up according to the definite plan and foreknowledge of God, you crucified and killed by the hands of lawless men.

cnv.text: 他照著　神的定旨和預知被交了出去，你們就藉不法之徒的手，把他釘死了。

ccb.text: 上帝照着自己的计划和预知把耶稣交在你们手里，你们借着邪恶之人的手把祂钉死在十字架上了。

csbs.text: 这一位照着神设定的计划和先见被交出去；你们就藉着外邦人的手，把他钉上十字架杀了。
